steps.title: Name the shortcut: discriminant = 0
steps.content: Exactly one real solution means the discriminant equals zero: $$b^2 - 4ac = 0.$$ For $7x^2 + 49x + c = 0$, identify $a = 7$, $b = 49$, $c = c$.

steps.title: Compute and solve
steps.content: Plug in: $$49^2 - 4(7)(c) = 0 \implies 2401 - 28c = 0 \implies c = \frac{2401}{28}.$$ Simplify using $2401 = 7^4$ and $28 = 4 \cdot 7$: $$c = \frac{7^3}{4} = \frac{343}{4}.$$ That matches choice D — D is correct.
